_comment: Claude Code Model Matchmaker config. Rules match top-to-bottom; first match wins. Edit patterns, models, effort, and thinking freely. See README for full docs.
_overrides: Prefix your hint with + for opus+medium or ++ for opus+high+thinking. No quotes needed. Example: cc +redesign auth system or cc ++prove this algorithm is correct

rules.name: deep-work
rules._comment: Architecture, strategy, security — sonnet with high effort

rules.name: housekeeping
rules._comment: Deploy, commit, push, status checks — cheap admin tasks. Must be above implementation since 'build' also appears in deploy contexts.

rules.name: implementation
rules._comment: Standard feature work and debugging — balanced

rules.name: quick-lookup
rules._comment: Search, navigation, formatting — fast and cheap
